invite.label: Invite Partner
invite.ownerOnly: Only the household owner can invite partners
invite.generated: Code generated — share it with your partner

deleteAccount.label: Delete My Account
deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.memberWarning: Your account and personal data will be permanently deleted. Household data (shopping lists, tasks) will remain.
deleteAccount.ownerWithMembersPrompt: Choose a new owner before deleting your account
deleteAccount.ownerTransferred: Ownership transferred. Your account will now be deleted.
deleteAccount.soloOwnerWarning: This will permanently delete your account and all household data including shopping lists, tasks, vouchers, reservations, and bills.

deleteHousehold.label: Delete Household
deleteHousehold.sublabel: Wipe all data for all members
deleteHousehold.title: Delete Household
deleteHousehold.ownerOnly: Only the household owner can delete the household
deleteHousehold.warning1: This will permanently delete all household data: shopping lists, tasks, vouchers, reservations, bills, and all uploaded images.
deleteHousehold.warning2: All members will be signed out immediately with no prior notice.
